scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: बच्चे की बर्थडे पार्टी? बाकी सब मम्मीयां फर्राटेदार English में बात कर रही थीं। [Child's birthday party? All the other mothers were speaking fluent English.]

Unknown speaker says: सुनीता बस एक कोने में चुपचाप खड़ी रही। बच्चे ने केक काटा। [Sunita just stood quietly in a corner. The child cut the cake.]

Unknown speaker says: फोटो के टाइम भी किसी ने नहीं बुलाया। अपने ही बच्चे की पार्टी में वो एक मेहमान बन कर रह गई। [Even at photo time, no one called her. She became a guest at her own child's party.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the emotional hook and pain point.
- Shows the protagonist feeling isolated and inadequate due to a language barrier.
- Creates immediate empathy for the mother.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: ये कहानी है सुनीता की। उम्र 34, पढ़ाई हिंदी मीडियम से। [This is the story of Sunita. Age 34, studied in Hindi medium.]

Unknown speaker says: पति ऑटो चलाते हैं। बेटा अर्जुन, 10 साल का, English medium स्कूल में। [Husband drives an auto. Son Arjun, 10 years old, in English medium school.]

Unknown speaker says: अर्जुन बड़ा हुआ तो English बोलने लगा। दोस्त English में, टीचर English में। और मां? सिर्फ हिंदी में। [When Arjun grew up, he started speaking English. Friends in English, teacher in English. And mother? Only in Hindi.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides context on the protagonist's background.
- Highlights the growing disconnect between the Hindi-speaking mother and her English-speaking son.
- Sets up the core conflict of the narrative.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: PTM में टीचर English में बात करतीं, और सुनीता बस 'Yes Madam, Yes Madam' कहती रह जाती। [In PTM, the teacher would speak in English, and Sunita would just keep saying 'Yes Madam, Yes Madam'.]

Unknown speaker says: अर्जुन को शर्म आती। एक दिन दोस्त ने पूछ लिया, 'तेरी मम्मी को English नहीं आती?' अर्जुन चुप रहा। [Arjun felt ashamed. One day a friend asked, 'Doesn't your mother know English?' Arjun stayed quiet.]

Unknown speaker says: उस दिन के बाद से उसने मम्मी को PTM में ले जाना बंद कर दिया। दोस्त आते, तो मम्मी को किचन में भेज देता। [After that day, he stopped taking mummy to PTM. When friends came, he would send mummy to the kitchen.]

Unknown speaker says: 'मम्मी, आप अंदर ही रहो।' अपने ही घर में वो छुप कर रहने लगी। ['Mummy, you stay inside.' She started living hidden in her own house.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Deepens the emotional pain by showing the son's embarrassment.
- Illustrates the real-world consequences of the language barrier (hiding during PTMs and playdates).
- Builds tension leading to the turning point.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: एक रात सुनीता ने अर्जुन का स्कूल बैग चेक किया। उसमें एक ड्राइंग मिली- 'My Family'। [One night Sunita checked Arjun's school bag. Found a drawing in it- 'My Family'.]

Unknown speaker says: पापा थे, अर्जुन था, उनका डॉग था... पर मां नहीं थी। [Papa was there, Arjun was there, their dog was there... but mother was not there.]

Unknown speaker says: उसी रात उसने ठान लिया— अब मैं English बोलना सीखूंगी। किसी और के लिए नहीं, अपनी खोई हुई जगह वापस पाने के लिए। [That very night she decided— now I will learn to speak English. Not for anyone else, to get back her lost place.]

Unknown speaker says: उसने Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड किया। [She downloaded the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- The emotional climax and turning point of the story.
- The mother realizes she is being erased from her son's life.
- Introduces the solution (Supernova app) as a tool for empowerment.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Supernova पर उसने रोज़मर्रा की English बोलना सीखा। 'How was school?', 'Would you like some snacks?' [On Supernova she learned to speak everyday English. 'How was school?', 'Would you like some snacks?']

Unknown speaker says: रात को अर्जुन के सोने के बाद, वो Supernova के AI Tutor के साथ बोल कर practice करती। [At night after Arjun slept, she would practice speaking with Supernova's AI Tutor.]

Unknown speaker says: 'Hello, I am Arjun's mother.' जब भी वो अटकती, AI Tutor बिना जज किए उसे सही करता। ['Hello, I am Arjun's mother.' Whenever she got stuck, the AI Tutor would correct her without judging.]

Unknown speaker says: सौ बार गलती की, सौ बार सुधारा। रोज़ बस 15 मिनट की practice से उसका confidence बढ़ने लगा। [Made mistakes a hundred times, corrected a hundred times. With just 15 minutes of daily practice, her confidence started growing.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's core features (AI Tutor, daily practice, real-world phrases).
- Shows the user's dedication and the safe, non-judgmental learning environment.
- Highlights the ease of fitting practice into a busy routine.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: अगली PTM आई। इस बार सुनीता खुद गई। [Next PTM came. This time Sunita went herself.]

Unknown speaker says: टीचर ने कहा, 'How is Arjun at home? He is very dedicated, but gets distracted by his phone sometimes.' [Teacher said, 'How is Arjun at home? He is very dedicated, but gets distracted by his phone sometimes.']

Unknown speaker says: सुनीता ने पूरे confidence से English में जवाब दिया। टीचर मुस्कुराईं, 'Mrs. Sunita, your English is very good.' अर्जुन हैरान रह गया। [Sunita answered in English with full confidence. The teacher smiled, 'Mrs. Sunita, your English is very good.' Arjun was left amazed.]

Unknown speaker says: रात को अर्जुन आया और बोला, 'Mummy, I am sorry. मैंने आपको PTM में आने से मना किया, दोस्तों के सामने छुपाया... I am sorry.' [At night Arjun came and said, 'Mummy, I am sorry. I forbade you from coming to PTM, hid you in front of friends... I am sorry.']

Unknown speaker says: सुनीता ने कुछ नहीं कहा, बस उसे गले लगा लिया। [Sunita didn't say anything, just hugged him.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the payoff: the mother successfully speaks English in a high-stakes situation.
- Shows the son's realization and heartfelt apology.
- Resolves the emotional conflict established earlier.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: अगले दिन एक नई ड्राइंग बनी। 'My Family'। पापा, अर्जुन, डॉग... और बीच में सबसे बड़ी, मां। [Next day a new drawing was made. 'My Family'. Papa, Arjun, Dog... and in the middle the biggest, Mother.]

Unknown speaker says: Supernova ऐप के साथ आप भी बिना डरे English बोलना सीखें। AI Tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करें। [With the Supernova app, you too can learn to speak English without fear. Practice daily with the AI Tutor.]

Unknown speaker says: English सीखने से शायद रातों-रात नौकरी ना बदले... [Learning English might not change your job overnight...]

Unknown speaker says: पर एक मां को अपने ही घर में, अपने बेटे की नज़रों में अपनी जगह वापस मिल गई। और यही सबसे बड़ी जीत है। [But a mother got her place back in her own house, in her son's eyes. And this is the biggest victory.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Visual and emotional closure with the updated family drawing.
- Transitions from the story to a direct call-to-action for the viewer.
- Reinforces the brand message of empowerment and gaining respect.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: आज ही Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करें और confidence के साथ English बोलना शुरू करें। [Download the Supernova app today and start speaking English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Final, clear call-to-action.
- Displays the brand logo and prompts app installation.
